headline: SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&P
summary: (Bloomberg) -- S&P Dow Jones Indices will keep its existing eligibility requirements for main benchmarks like the S&P 500 Index, rejecting proposals that would have made it faster for mega-cap companies such as Elon Musk’s SpaceX to gain rapid entry into the benchmark after going public.Most Read from BloombergGlazer Family Members Study Manchester United Stake SaleRepublican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking TrumpDow Average Hits Peak as Old-School Stocks Beat AI: Markets WrapTrump Beg

content.title: SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&P
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- S&P Dow Jones Indices will keep its existing eligibility requirements for main benchmarks like the S&P 500 Index, rejecting proposals that would have made it faster for mega-cap companies such as Elon Musk’s SpaceX to gain rapid entry into the benchmark after going public.Most Read from BloombergGlazer Family Members Study Manchester United Stake SaleRepublican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking TrumpDow Average Hits Peak as Old-School Stocks Beat AI: Markets WrapTrump Beg
